description: Router scans index.json with routing_mode=explicit-pool-required. Finds stale-pool but it is stale — only valid pool will be removed.
assertion: routing_mode is explicit-pool-required; stale-pool is the only pool; it is stale

description: FR-MMT22 Condition 2 fires and cleanup runs. stale-pool removed from index. Warning shown once.
assertion: stale-pool cleaned up; warning shown; index now empty

description: After cleanup, no matching pool remains. routing_mode=explicit-pool-required: cannot fall back — command aborts with error.
assertion: routing_decision is fell-back-no-pool; abort is true; error_shown is true; error_text contains 'No standing pool matches'

description: Command halts. No fresh spawn. User must supply a valid pool name or create one.
assertion: result is aborted; no review was started
